title: Stringly-typed roles throughout TUI — introduce Role enum
description:
Current state: 

Desired state: 

Reason: 

Dimension: Cognitive Readability / Type Safety
Location: src/tui/messages.rs:11 (role: String), src/tui/app.rs:393, 410, 431, 510, 593+ (~60 hits across app.rs), .as_str() == Some("user") / == Some("system") / == Some("assistant") patterns
Violation: The message role is stored as a String and compared to string literals everywhere. Typos are undetectable ("assisant" would silently route to the _ arm). DisplayMessage and TuiSession both pay this cost. This is the textbook 'stringly typed' anti-pattern.
Mandated Refactor: pub enum Role { User, Assistant, System, Tool } with serde(rename_all = "lowercase") + FromStr for wire-format boundaries only. Internally every comparison becomes exhaustive. Combine with finding #275 (MessageKind enum). Also replace TuiSession.mode: String with pub enum Mode { Build, Plan } (see toggle_mode at src/tui/app.rs:78) and effort_level: String with pub enum EffortLevel { Low, Medium, High } (see src/tui/app.rs:923-946 cycle logic).
